title: SocialCipher: A Multimodal Framework for Proactive Threat Detection with SentIntel
description: Co-authored paper on proactive cyber threat detection using sentiment analysis and LLMs. Research conducted at MIT Lincoln Laboratory.

title: Geneva — Protocol Obfuscation Research
description: Researching Text-to-Speech quirks for practical applications in circumventing censorship detection. Establishing baselines for detectability vs throughput.

title: Cyber Threat Intelligence Research
description: Threat intelligence on APTs 40 and 41, with threat profiles and a briefing for NSA leadership.
